pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly zips 10 downloaded images into this exact path.
task description instructs to save images in this directory, and export_result.sh explicitly checks for its existence.
task description asks to resize to exactly 1080 pixels, and verifier.py checks that the width of processed files is 1080.
setup_task.sh iterates from 1 to 10 downloading 10 images, and task instructions also mention 10 photos.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically assembled data where 10 random images are downloaded from picsum.photos and zipped into '/home/ga/Documents/summer_campaign_raw.zip' via setup_task.sh. The expected output directory '/home/ga/Documents/Processed_Campaign', the expected count of 10, and the 1080px width target are explicitly verified against the task instructions, setup script, and evaluation scripts.
